name: FLEXstand FX ILS
comment: Simplify setups and get the party started faster with FLEXstand FX ILS, the multi-purpose stand that doubles as a lightshow. This heavy-duty timesaver has 68 built-in LEDs and auto programs that can be resized to fit the chosen stand height. Its trigger-style safety release enables DJs, performers, and event managers to make smooth and secure height adjustments on the fly. ILS, RF, and DMX control options mean this stand can be operated just like any other lighting fixture for flawlessly synced shows every time. Quickly achieve eye-catching mobile entertainment setups with FLEXstand FX ILS.
